title: I AM STEVE!
description: Jack Black, I mean, STEVE, spawns in his tower and shouts I AM STEVE
body:
### Jack Black spawns on his tower and shouts I AM STEVE!
He drops his blue shirt or his phone on death.
He has 50 health, and will only attack if you attack him.
The shirt says it has +100 armour, but dosen't work like it does.
Theres a structure called the steve tower that spawns in the forest. This is where Jack Black Spawns.
If you left click his phone it will ring and open a gui. Thanks to Duck Meme for the phone ring sound from this video: [I Am Steve Phone Ringtones](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AkVbdu4wiWY).
This is my first ever mod.
Sorry for Neoforge only not much I can do about that right now.
